[This deserves an applause]
Hello everyone
I came to Changwon today to eat some chicken
I usually prefer boneless when eating chicken because picking out the bones becomes a tedious task
This chicken restaurant only has boneless
Boneless chicken is in trend right now
Over here!

Attack!

Hello, I am Soonsarman's prettiest
-I didn't get any sleep -Really?
Too nervous to meet you
I will prepare the food for you
Please attack it with power and aggression

[I will do my best]

[It was super effective!]

That's too much pressure
[2nd attack]
We are a boneless chicken restaurant that only uses drumstick meat
Our main dish: Chi Pa Po It's 5 different chicken flavors with potatoes

That's good as a family meal of 4~5 people
